calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Morgan Stanley Smith Barney Llcs Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon
Off Calendar Aug-27-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONER Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon is granted. No opposition filed.

Order and separate judgment submitted with moving papers both signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EPS)
